name: daw-pro-mcp
description: MCP server exposing DAW Pro to AI agents: bridges to the app's control WebSocket and calls Anthropic/OpenAI/Suno directly for generation tasks.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/ai.test.js dist-test/test/arrange-ergonomics.test.js dist-test/test/audit-tools.test.js dist-test/test/automation-master.test.js dist-test/test/clip-time-range.test.js dist-test/test/connection-info.test.js dist-test/test/controller-lane.test.js dist-test/test/copilot.test.js dist-test/test/sample-library.test.js dist-test/test/sound-banks.test.js dist-test/test/tempo-lint.test.js dist-test/test/vc.test.js dist-test/test/integration.test.js
